prompt: run a broad job search across Israeli sites for yoad. he's a recent CS graduate looking for any junior dev role in israel or remote. no specific tech stack preference

assertions.text: WebSearch queries target multiple Israeli job sites (at least 2 different domains)
Both Hebrew and English search queries are used
Results are scored or categorized by fit level (High/Medium/Low or similar)
Output references ~/.yoad-jobs/ data directory (preferences or history)
Results include source attribution for each job listing
